description: 134 - 16-03-2025 - Email to Peter Mandelson from Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

participants.name: Email to Peter Mandelson from Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

text:
(former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

From: Oliver Robbins| Personal

Sent: Sun 16/03/2025 10:17:31 AM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson|Personal

Subject: PERSONAL] DRAFT ADVICE ON SVs
Attachment: 2025-03-16 mn PM SVs.docx

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

Peter

To try to set this all out in one place, | attach a draft submission for the PM. Grateful
for any comments today if poss so | can get this to him in good time before his next
Audience and bring some discipline to the wider interested HMG community.

Olly

Sir Oliver Robbins KCMG CB

Permanent Under-Secretary | Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | Email:

Personal

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

394

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG 
ONLY
PM
Cc FS, Cab Sec, Morgan, Nin, Ailsa, NSA, HMA Wash, HMA Paris, Dir/Protocol
INWARD STATE VISITS IN 2025
***
395


OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG 
ONLY
OR
***
396
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
